sketches.mechanism: Goroutine launched but never joined — the main function exits before the goroutine can speak, so its message is forever undelivered
sketches.resonance: The things we meant to say disappear not because they weren't formed, but because no one waited to hear them.

sketches.mechanism: The sealed class requires exhaustive when-matching, but one branch is deliberately typed as Nothing — a subtype that can never be instantiated
sketches.resonance: Among all the possible outcomes we plan for, there is always one we name but can never reach.

sketches.mechanism: The wantarray() function changes behavior depending on what the caller expects — the same expression yields different things depending on the context it's received in
sketches.resonance: What we give and what is received are never the same; meaning is shaped by whoever is listening.
